title: Digital Im(mortality): Global Perspectives on Death, Technology,and the Future of Intelligence
institution: Leverhulme Centre for the Future of Intelligence
abstract: Invited as an expert from the India chapter to participate in an international workshop on Digital Im(mortality), co-hosted by the Leverhulme Centre for the Future of Intelligence, University of Cambridge and Ashoka University in New Delhi. The workshop convened leading voices to examine how diverse cultures interpret digital immortality in relation to death and afterlife traditions. Together, participants explored ethical frameworks and envisioned culturally grounded futures for AI-driven technologies and digital afterlife practices.
